Interface IRasterDatasetEdit3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control editing of a RasterDataset.

[Guid("8E68E3DA-30D6-492B-B12E-CA2669A106EF")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterDatasetEdit3 : IRasterDatasetEdit2, IRasterDatasetEdit
